scope_note: Duke University does not publish a minimum GPA cutoff or admitted-student GPA distribution on the cited official pages used here. The policy section stays official; the estimate card below is third-party and directional.
policy_summary: Duke does not publish a minimum GPA on the cited admissions pages. Instead, Duke says academic performance as measured by grades in academic courses is one of its five primary review factors and evaluates those grades alongside course rigor.

what_mit_does_say.claim: Duke does not publish a minimum GPA on the cited admissions pages. Instead, Duke says academic performance as measured by grades in academic courses is one of its five primary review factors and evaluates those grades alongside course rigor.

recommended_gpa.summary: Duke does not publish HS GPA data for its incoming class on the cited official pages. The estimate below is a third-party directional reference, not an official Duke cutoff.

estimates.label: Weighted (estimate)
estimates.method: Estimated by PrepScholar because the university did not officially report an average incoming high-school GPA on the cited admissions pages.

recommended_gpa.interpretation: This estimate points to near-straight-A high school performance in a rigorous schedule. Use Duke's official review language above as the real policy; the number is only a directional benchmark.
